zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud de Verdun於1225年9月4日出生在英國林可爾史爾林肯時，她的父親Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Ireland25歲，母親Rohese de Verdun22歲。她於1244年與John FitzAlan II結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1283年11月27日在英國英格蘭素可阿盧德爾 卡素享年58歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾史福斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud de Verdun于1225年9月4日出生在英国林可爾史爾林肯时，她的父亲Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Ireland25岁，母亲Rohese de Verdun22岁。她于1244年与John FitzAlan II结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1283年11月27日在英国英格兰素可阿盧德爾 卡素享年58岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾史福斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Verdun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from any of several places in France called Verdun. The placename is probably of Gaulish origin, deriving from ver(n) ‘alder’ + dūn ‘hill, fortress’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from Verdú in Catalonia (Spain), which has the same origin as the French name (see 1 above).
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Verdon  , a cognate of 1 above. This surname is very rare in Britain.

variants.name: Virden
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Verdun  .

variants.name: Verdon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Pierre, Renaud, Sylvie.
French: habitational name from (Le) Verdon, the name of several places in various parts of France, for example in Dordogne, Gironde, and Marne. Compare   Ferdon  .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Verdun, the name of a fief in Vessey (Manche), France. Compare   Verdun  .

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud de Verdun was born on 4 September 1225, in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Ireland, was 25 and her mother, Rohese de Verdun, was 22. She married John FitzAlan II in 1244. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 27 November 1283, in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud de Verdun est née le 4 septembre 1225, à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Ireland, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Rohese de Verdun, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John FitzAlan II en 1244. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 27 novembre 1283, à Arundel Castle, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud de Verdun am 4. September 1225 in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Ireland 25 und ihre Mutter Rohese de Verdun 22. Sie hat 1244 John FitzAlan II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 27. November 1283 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Arundel Castle, Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England begraben.

Lei sposato John FitzAlan II nel 1244. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 27 novembre 1283, nel Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud de Verdunが1225年9月4日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンで生まれた時，父Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Irelandは25歳，母Rohese de Verdunは22歳であった。1244年にJohn FitzAlan IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1283年11月27日にイギリスイギリススセックスアルンデル カストルで58歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud de Verdun(이)가 1225년 9월 4일 영국 링코실르 링코컨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Ireland(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rohese de Verdun(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1244년 John FitzAlan II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1283년 11월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 아런들 카스틀에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Verdun nasceu em 4 de setembro de 1225, em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Ireland, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Rohese de Verdun, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com John FitzAlan II em 1244. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 27 de novembro de 1283, em Arundel Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud de Verdun родилась 4 сентября 1225 г. в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Theobald Le Boteler 2nd Chief Butler of Ireland было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Rohese de Verdun, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John FitzAlan II в 1244 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 27 ноября 1283 г. в местности арундель кастл, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия.
